Cursor Lab

Final · As Shipped SAME MODULE THE GAME LOADS (shared/cursor.js)
Interactive — target brackets
Sledge Hammer x1 · 8.2kg
Dowel Bat x1 · 1.4kg
Bread x3 · 0.9kg
Text entry — I-beam
Misc
Read the manual
Map area — registration mark (locks on over a POI)
WORLD MAP (FAKE) — hover a POI, drag/click to feel the press state
ARROW = default · BRACKETS = interactive · I-BEAM = text · REGISTRATION = map · CLICK = small red ring
